subcodes.first_line: O Nuru'llah! Upon thee be His glory and His peace! In these days the wolves of the earth have encompassed the sheep of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا نورالله علیک بهائه و سلامه این ایام ذاب ارض اغنام الهی را احاطه نموده
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @chastisement and requital, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @justice and wrath of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement
